extraction_notes: Graph reflects Palantir's two-segment structure (Government/Commercial) with four principal platforms (Gotham, Foundry, Apollo, AIP) plus Developer Tier as child offering of both Foundry and AIP. Government segment anchored to defense/intelligence agencies via direct sales; Commercial segment serves multiple verticals including enterprises, developers, and industry-specific organizations. Developer Tier maintains dual parentage as specified in memo. Corporate scope includes worldwide operations with explicit US presence and Fujitsu partnership.
